description: Bonifacio Caput, a 45-year-old factory maintenance worker, presents for his mandatory annual occupational health screening with fasting labs showing blood glucose 142 mg/dL, BP 148/94 mmHg, total cholesterol 268 mg/dL (LDL 178, HDL 34), and BMI 31.2. As the occupational health physician, manage his metabolic syndrome workup in GNU Health. Document Type 2 diabetes mellitus (E11), Essential hypertension (I10), and Dyslipidemia (E78) as active conditions. Initiate a pharmacotherapy regimen consisting of Metformin, an ACEi/ARB/CCB (such as Enalapril, Losartan, or Amlodipine), and a Statin. Order a metabolic monitoring lab panel with at least three tests (such as HbA1c, Lipid panel, or BMP), record a dietary/exercise counseling session in his lifestyle record, and schedule a follow-up appointment in 60 to 120 days. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
